name: FightBoss
_source: s;{v:FinalBoss};Think you can stop me? Ha! Let's see you try.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;{v:FinalBoss};What, you're gonna kill me? Let's see about that!;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;{v:FinalBoss};Just try to hit me! I dare you!;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;{v:FinalBoss};Surrender or face a death most vile.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;{v:FinalBoss};You dare stand in my way?|You're a fool!;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
